/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsensor__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libsensor__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/sensor__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/sensor/msg/_workload_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cnrlab/Desktop/scx_basic/workload/n1_4/build/sensor:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libsensor__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libsensor__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
